title: The Oil and Natural Gas Commission (Transfer of Undertaking and Repeal) Act, 1993
full_text: The Oil and Natural Gas Commission (Transfer of Undertaking and Repeal) Act, 1993 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 199365 Act Number: 65 Enactment Date: 1993-09-04 Act Year: 1993 Short Title: The Oil and Natural Gas Commission (Transfer of Undertaking and Repeal) Act, 1993 Long Title: An Act to provide for the transfer and vesting of the undertaking of the Oil and Natural Gas Commission to and in the Oil and Natural Gas Corporation Limited, a company incorporated under the Companies Act, 1956, and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto and also to repeal the Oil and Natural Gas Commission Act, 1959. Ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas Enforcement Date: 02-07-1993 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Oil and Natural Gas Commission (Transfer of Undertaking and Repeal) Act, 1993 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Undertaking of Commission to vest in Corporation. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. General effect of vesting of undertaking in Corporation. Section 5. Licences, etc., to be deemed to have been granted to Corporation. Section 6. Tax exemption or benefit to continue to have effect. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Guarantee to be operative. Section 8. Provisions in respect of officers and other employees of Commission. Section 9. Power of entry. Section 10. Power to make rules. Section 11. Repeal of Act 48 of 1959. Section 12. Repeal and saving.
